/Users/c0d3_cru5h/.nix-profile/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_framework.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_item_effects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_healthbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_wavemanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/3Rats_tests.dir/test_timemanager.cpp.o -o 3Rats_tests   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib ../lib3RatsLib.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.30.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.0/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.22.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.3/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib
